english: Radiant as a crore of rising suns, adorned with glowing armlets and garlands
roman: Udyad bhanu sahasra koti sadrisham keyura haro jjvalam

english: With lips red as bimba fruit, beautiful smile revealing white teeth, adorned in yellow silk
roman: Bimbo shtim smita danta pankti ruchiraam pitambara lankritam

english: Whose feet are served by Vishnu, Brahma and Indra, who is the truth itself, the auspicious
roman: Vishnu Brahma surendra sevita padam tattva svarupam Shivam

english: I constantly bow to Meenakshi, ocean of compassion
roman: Meenakshim pranato asmi santatam aham karunaya varnanidhim

english: Adorned with anklets of gems and pearls, soft as the radiance of a lotus
roman: Mukta mani nupura abhiramitam padma prabha komalam

english: Whose body is full, fleshy and lotus-like, whose glorious feet are worshipped with lotuses
roman: Padmabham paripurna amsal tanum padma archita shri padam

english: Who illumines all directions with jewels, wearing garlands of beautiful flowers
I constantly bow to Meenakshi, ocean of compassion
roman: Meenakshim pranato asmi santatam aham karunaya varnanidhim

hindi: श्री विद्यां शिव वामभागनिलयां ह्रींकार मन्त्रोज्ज्वलां,
english: Sri Vidya, dwelling on the left side of Shiva, radiant with the Hreem mantra
roman: Shri Vidyam Shiva vama bhaga nilayam hrinkara mantr ojjvalam

english: Dwelling in the bindu at the center of the Shri Chakra, with glorious auspicious feet
roman: Shri chakrankita bindu madhya vasatim Shrimat sabha Shripadam

english: Dear to Shri Shankara, attended by Shanmukha, Vishnu and the universe
roman: Shrimat Shanmukha Vishnu vishva sahita Shri Shankara Isha priyam

english: I constantly bow to Meenakshi, ocean of compassion
roman: Meenakshim pranato asmi santatam aham karunaya varnanidhim
